sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n60728" key="kullo/pous" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κυλλό-πους</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">πουν</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, gen. <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ποδος</itype>, <sense id="n60728.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">club-footed</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1875.tlg001:8" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aristodem.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">8</biblScope> </bibl>; <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">θεοί</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0067.tlg001:7" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Agatharch.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">7</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
